title: Braised Croatian Tomatoes
description: A hearty dish featuring tender tomatoes in a rich, flavorful sauce. This Croatian-inspired recipe is perfect for a cozy dinner or special occasion.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are soft and caramelized, about 20 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced black olives and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped tomatoes, paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the braising liquid and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve the braised tomatoes hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
